request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values stability and responsibility, I've been really concerned about how our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure puts our national security at risk. Supporting strategic autonomy isn't about isolation; it's about fulfilling our duty to keep our country safe. #NationalSecurityFirst #DutyBeforePolitics
